[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000001 1
1 0100000 1
2 0000110 2
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0000000 a
7 0000000 a

12 21 0000100 1

67 76 0000000 a match 3 4 5 6 7
70 07 0011110 4
